vocab.molto successo: much success; a lot of success
vocab.che parlava di: that talked about; that was about

vocab.successo: success; happened (note: can mean 'success' as a noun or 'happened' as a past participle)

vocab.di cui: of which; about which; whose (relative pronoun)
vocab.vi: to you; for you (formal/plural, indirect object pronoun)

vocab.è bene: it is good; it is advisable
vocab.criticità: critical points; issues; problems (note: refers to difficulties or challenges)
vocab.si possono incontrare: can be encountered; can be met

vocab.1-2° in meno: 1-2 degrees less; 1-2 grades lower (context: difficulty level)
vocab.al proprio obiettivo: to one's own goal; to your goal
vocab.al proprio progetto: to one's own project; to your project

vocab.che si vuole chiudere: wants to finish; wants to complete

vocab.flashare: flash (climbing term: to complete on first attempt)
vocab.a vista: on sight (climbing term: to complete on first try without prior info)
vocab.tiro: pitch (climbing term: section of a route)

vocab.si cerca di: one tries to; people try to

vocab.in maniera: in a way; in a manner

vocab.in catena: at the anchor; at the chain (climbing context)
vocab.si arriva: one arrives; you arrive; we arrive (impersonal/reflexive construction)
vocab.ci si fa calare: one lets oneself be lowered; you get lowered (impersonal/reflexive construction)

vocab.si sfila: is pulled out; is slipped off

vocab.quello di: that of; the one of (used to specify purpose)

vocab.in maniera: in a way; in a manner

vocab.in catena: on the chain (climbing term: at the anchor)
vocab.la seconda ripetizione: the second repetition; the second go (climbing context)
vocab.ci si fa calare: one lowers oneself; you get lowered (impersonal/reflexive construction)

vocab.questa: this (feminine, refers to something previously mentioned)

vocab.si cerca di: one tries to; we try to (impersonal construction)
vocab.andare a cedimento: go to failure; reach failure (fitness context)

vocab.ecco: here is; here are; look; so (attention-getter)

vocab.si va a: one goes to; you go to

vocab.allo scopo di: for the purpose of; in order to

vocab.un po' più: a bit more; a little more

vocab.di approfondirlo: to deepen it; to explore it further
vocab.quando stiamo svolgendo: when we are carrying out; when we are doing
vocab.il metodo delle: the method of the (note: incomplete, context needed)

vocab.ci fa venire: makes us get; causes us to have
vocab.la ghisa: muscle soreness; muscle stiffness (lit. 'the iron', slang for muscle fatigue)

vocab.il tiro: the shot; the attempt; the effort (context: sports or exertion)
vocab.dall'altra parte: on the other hand; on the other side

vocab.bulder: bouldering (note: 'bulder' is a misspelling of 'boulder' or 'bouldering')

vocab.metabolismo anaerobico alattacido: alactic anaerobic metabolism (anaerobic metabolism without lactate production)
vocab.metabolismo anaerobico lattacido: lactic anaerobic metabolism (anaerobic metabolism with lactate production)
vocab.ha comunque un'influenza: still has an influence; nevertheless has an influence
vocab.ci stiamo: we are there; we are (in it) (note: 'ci stiamo' here refers to being engaged in the activity)

vocab.riusciamo a: we manage to; we are able to
vocab.nel migliore dei modi: in the best way; in the best possible way

vocab.bulder: bouldering (note: 'bulder' is a misspelling of 'boulder' or 'bouldering')
vocab.riuscire a: to manage to; to be able to

vocab.in falesia: on crag; on cliff (rock climbing context)

vocab.ricordiamo: we remember; let's remember; recall (note: often used to remind)

vocab.il metabolismo anaerobico lattacido: the anaerobic lactic metabolism (note: specific metabolic pathway)

vocab.siamo lavorando: we are working (out); we are working

vocab.smaltire: to get rid of; to dispose of; to clear

vocab.andiamo a: we go to; we are going to (used to indicate intention or action about to happen)

vocab.a vista: onsight (climbing term: without prior practice or information)
vocab.flash: flash (climbing term: with prior information but no practice)
vocab.tiro: pitch (climbing term: section of a climb)

vocab.tenere duro: hold on; persevere; tough it out (idiomatic: to endure or persist)

vocab.un tiro a vista: an onsight attempt (climbing term: first try without prior info)
vocab.flash: flash (climbing term: first try with prior info)

vocab.a vista: onsight (climbing term: without prior practice or information)

vocab.saper: know how to; be able to
vocab.in maniera: in a way; in a manner

vocab.in maniera bella veloce: in a really fast way; very quickly (note: 'bella' here intensifies 'veloce')

vocab.un po' più: a bit more; a little more

vocab.ghisa: cast iron (here: metaphor for heaviness or difficulty)
vocab.mano a mano: gradually; little by little; as (something) goes on

vocab.sghisare: to slide (slang; possibly regional or sport-specific)

vocab.per forza di cose: necessarily; inevitably (lit. by force of things)

vocab.sia...a: both...and; learns to...as well as (correlative construction)

vocab.si sono venuti a sviluppare: have developed; have come to develop (reflexive, passive construction)
vocab.sia: either; or; both (here: 'as well as', conjunction)

vocab.come già detto: as already said; as already mentioned

vocab.farmi sapere: let me know; make me know (lit.)

vocab.avuto modo di: had a chance to; had an opportunity to

vocab.della resistenza: of resistance; of stamina (note: 'resistenza' can mean physical stamina or resistance)
vocab.ad iscrivervi: to subscribe; to sign up (note: reflexive, 'yourselves')
vocab.a mettere: to put; to give (context: likely 'to give a like' or similar)

vocab.venitemi a trovare: come visit me; come find me

vocab.ciao a tutti: bye everyone; hello everyone (context: farewell here)
